t_apply_empty.solution:
Lemma t_apply_empty : forall (A : Type) (x : string) (v : A),
  (_ !-> v) x = v.
Proof.
  intros. unfold t_empty. reflexivity.
Qed.
t_apply_empty.explanation: Applying the empty total map to any key returns the default value.

t_update_eq.solution:
Lemma t_update_eq : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x v,
  (x !-> v ; m) x = v.
Proof.
  intros. unfold t_update. rewrite String.eqb_refl. reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_eq.explanation: Looking up the key that was just updated returns the new value.

t_update_neq.solution:
Theorem t_update_neq : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x1 x2 v,
  x1 <> x2 ->
  (x1 !-> v ; m) x2 = m x2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold t_update.
  destruct (String.eqb_spec x1 x2).
  - contradiction.
  - reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_neq.explanation: Looking up a different key after an update returns the original value.

t_update_shadow.solution:
Lemma t_update_shadow : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x v1 v2,
  (x !-> v2 ; x !-> v1 ; m) = (x !-> v2 ; m).
Proof.
  intros. apply functional_extensionality. intros y.
  unfold t_update. destruct (String.eqb_spec x y); reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_shadow.explanation: A second update to the same key shadows the first update.

t_update_same.solution:
Theorem t_update_same : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A) x,
  (x !-> m x ; m) = m.
Proof.
  intros. apply functional_extensionality. intros y.
  unfold t_update. destruct (String.eqb_spec x y).
  - subst. reflexivity.
  - reflexivity.
Qed.
t_update_same.explanation: Updating a key with its current value is a no-op.

t_update_permute.solution:
Theorem t_update_permute : forall (A : Type) (m : total_map A)
                                 v1 v2 x1 x2,
  x2 <> x1 ->
  (x1 !-> v1 ; x2 !-> v2 ; m) = (x2 !-> v2 ; x1 !-> v1 ; m).
Proof.
  intros. apply functional_extensionality. intros y.
  unfold t_update.
  destruct (String.eqb_spec x1 y); destruct (String.eqb_spec x2 y);
  subst; try reflexivity.
  contradiction.
Qed.
t_update_permute.explanation: Updates to different keys can be reordered.
